title: rinorea ovalifolia
intro: Rinorea ovalifolia, also known as the oval-leaved rinorea, is a plant species in the family Violaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rinorea ovalifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Rinorea ovalifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses.
